text: (s CloudFormation cfn-hup @ ssncact @ s e cfn-init is run once as part of bootstrapping (user data) e ..if CloudFormation::Init is updated, it isn’t rerun e cfn-hup helper is a daemon which can be installed » .. it detects changes in resource metadata ¢ .. running configurable actions when a change is detected e UpdateStack => updated config on EC2 instances
